revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Anthropomorphic caniforms]] to [[Category:Anthropomorphic mammals]] https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Categories_for_discussion/Log/2024_January_15#Category:Anthropomorphic_carnivorans using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[Anthropomorphic]] [[canid]] characters, which includes [[canine]]s.
[[Category:Anthropomorphic mammals|canids]] [[Category:Fictional canids| ]]

revision.text:
